_doc: Cross-session memory for Claude. Updated by skills as they work. Read by /seo-brain at session start (Step 0c). Git-tracked so it survives machines. Schema is intentionally minimal — Pending Commitments + Activity Log carry the heavier per-action audit trail; this file is just the 'where we are' pointer.

currentSprint.name: Content refresh sprint + 3-day infra plan + Notion layout cleanup
currentSprint.summary: 14 content batches shipped. Day 1 + Day 3 infra complete (Pending Commitments DB, 4-stage audit, intent-routing in /seo-brain, session state, skill changelog convention). Day 2 (digest worker) deferred with trigger condition. Notion brain page restructured into 5 sections by reading frequency. Content Roadmap moved to a new sub-page. Multi-source DB explicitly rejected.
currentSprint.nextPlannedAction: Smoke test brain page in Notion UI; verify the 5-section flow reads well. Future sessions: use /seo-brain audit profile to confirm zero stale candidates remain.
